title: Chewy Floral Chinese Tofu Stir-fry
description: A fragrant, protein-packed tofu dish featuring red pepper, basil, and a tangy glaze—ideal for a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: pressed to remove excess moisture before cooking

instructions: Press tofu for 20 minutes to remove excess moisture, then cut into 1-inch cubes.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat; add tofu cubes and cook until golden on all sides, about 6‑8 minutes. Remove tofu and set aside.
In the same wok, add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sliced red bell pepper and stir‑fry for 2‑3 minutes until slightly tender but still crisp.
Whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, and chili flakes; pour into wok and let simmer for 1 minute.
Return tofu to wok, toss to coat with sauce and cook for another 2 minutes.
Stir in fresh basil leaves, scallion slices, and toasted sesame seeds; cook for an additional 30 seconds, just until basil wilts.
Transfer to serving bowl, garnish with extra basil and sesame seeds if desired, and serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
